name: Corn Oat Pones
recipeIngredient: Herbs, such as rosemary, thyme, oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the oatmeal and corn meal with your choice of herbs (rosemary, thyme, oregano).
3. Gradually pour half (or less) of the boiling water and olive oil into the dry ingredients at the same time. Add only enough water to make a very stiff semi-dry mixture.
4. Let cool for 30 minutes. Form into patties about 3 to 3 1/2 inches in diameter and place on greased cookie sheets.
5. Place the cookie sheets in a pre-heated oven (350°F to 375°F) and bake for an hour or until brown around the edges. Turn off the oven, then leave the pones inside while the oven cools.
These Pones will keep in the freezer for months.
